---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.\
    GPA: 3.20/4
-   Sami Yangın Anatolian High School

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  WonderWorks, Seasonal Team Member, June 2025 - 3 Months

## Internships

1.  Yetkin Gencler, Trainee, (March 2023 – 3 months

# Projects

<https://github.com/mehmetokszgl/College-Tour-TSP>\
This project solves a real-world, multi-day Traveling Salesman Problem for a college tour across 58 universities in Istanbul using Adaptive Large Neighborhood Search (ALNS) with Simulated Annealing and 2-opt, based on real road distance data.

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, Microsoft Excel, AutoCAD

# Hobbies

Tennis\
Chess\
Swimming\
Football\
Cooking\
\
[Öz Geçmişime Ulaşmak İçin Tıklayın](cv-eng.pdf)
